message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #777777
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  ActorBorderColor #777777
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  ArrowColor #333333
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor transparent
}

actor UI
participant sessionRoute
participant passport
participant SessionController
database innoDB

UI -> sessionRoute : GET() "/session"\nAuth: Bearer token\n{userID, DASS21_SCORES, sessionDetails}
sessionRoute -> passport : "/save", authenticate("jwt")

alt Success: Authenticated
  passport --> sessionRoute : done(null, user)
  sessionRoute -> SessionController : Request Products
  SessionController -> SessionController : Validate info

  alt Success: Required info provided
    SessionController -> innoDB : saveSession()
    innoDB --> SessionController : session
    SessionController --> sessionRoute : httpResponse(200)\nsession
    sessionRoute --> UI : httpResponse(200)\nallProducts
  else Failure: missing information
    SessionController --> sessionRoute : {"msg":"missing required\ninformation"}(400)
    sessionRoute --> UI : http Response(400)\n{"msg":"missing required information"}
  end

else Failure: Unauthorized
  passport --> sessionRoute : done(null,false)
  sessionRoute --> UI : http Response(401)\nUnauthorized
end

@enduml
